description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of light gray and brown wall finishes, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light. The front entrance is accessible via a paved walkway, flanked by landscaped trees and shrubs. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area, partially enclosed by low walls and surrounded by additional greenery. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible kitchen, living, and bedroom spaces, and the overall design emphasizes simplicity and functionality. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall, enhancing privacy while maintaining an open, airy feel.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. Features an open-plan layout, paved walkway, and a spacious rear patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and several trees near the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boundary wall, side windows, and the transition to the rear patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, low boundary wall, and extensive greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible windows, side entrance, and more landscaping details.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
